title: Happy Ghast
description: A simple [backport] mod recreating the happy ghast showcased for the 2025 summer drop during minecraft live
body:
![Mod title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95b2143d0474f3de69ab7d93685cd18e56c58fe5.png)

### _a mod made in collaboration with leblobb_

## This mod adds the Happy Ghast, showcase during the 2025 Spring Minecraft Live for the summer drop for 2025. 
The mod adds; 

The mountable happy ghast entity; which can accomodate upto 4 passengers as showcased during minecraft live

![Happy Ghast being ridden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f64e1f0fc22da7dbb82fca9536c393aca985fac6.png)

## The Dried Ghast blocks [sad, neutral, happy]
dried ghast blocks (only first variant) can be found semi rarely near nether fossils only in soul-sand valleys
obtaining the dried ghast block gives the "Is it Kalamari or Calamari?" achievement

![three stages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a2145f5cc9b948afa1dd7862f2a18083eb4db22_0.webp)

They can be crafted with 5 bone blocks and 4 ghast tears

![crafting dried ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f68beea9a333ca182ef33cdd114320c87bd77400.png)

## Harnesses
adds all the colored variants + normal(without drapery)

![harnesses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8166c7b4596e0724d1e201557cec1a4a27e8c265.png)


Visit the planet minecraft page for the mod;   
[![planet minecraft page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60374cd6a601b8c6cbdd82e57f34d613761c845b.png)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/mod/happy-ghast-6569712/)
